title: Gooey, Pillowy American Pork Dumplings
description: Fork-tender pork and fluffy dumpling wrappers filled with a rich, green olive-infused pork and vegetable mixture, served in a savory wok.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the dumpling wrappers according to package instructions.
In a large wok or skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper to the wok and stir to combine.
Add the cooked dumpling wrappers to the wok and stir to combine with the pork mixture.
Add the chopped green olives and scallions to the wok and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the dumplings are heated through.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with additional scallions and green olives if desired.
